additional_remarks.remark:
1. CG 24 26 04 13 — Amendment of Aggregate Limits of Insurance - Per Project
2. IL 00 21 09 08 — Nuclear Energy Liability Exclusion Endorsement
3. CG 25 03 05 09 — Designated Construction Projects General Aggregate Limit
4. WC 00 01 06 — Workers' Compensation and Employers Liability Insurance Policy
5. CG 24 04 05 09 — Waiver of Transfer of Rights of Recovery Against Others to Us
6. WC 00 03 13A — Alternate Employer Endorsement
Additional Insured status is extended to Westbridge Realty Management Inc. as required by written contract. Coverage is primary and non-contributory.
Primary and Non-Contributory wording applies per policy endorsement.

LOC-001: Corporate Headquarters — 300 Liberty Avenue, Suite 1200, Pittsburgh, PA 15222 (Occupancy: Offices)
LOC-002: Main Equipment Yard & Warehouse — 4500 Butler Street, Pittsburgh, PA 15201 (Occupancy: Warehouse)
LOC-003: Fabrication Shop — 6290 Bakerstown Road, Pittsburgh, PA 15205 (Occupancy: Manufacturing)
LOC-004: South Hills Branch Office — 800 Village Run Road, Wexford, PA 15090 (Occupancy: Office)
Evidence of Workers' Compensation coverage is required from all subcontractors prior to commencing work on the project.

The insured's principal operations consist of General contracting for commercial and institutional construction — healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania. Entity type: Corporation.

remarks: Attached to Form Number: ACORD 130; Form Title: Workers Compensation Application. Endorsement schedule, additional insured wording, special conditions, location descriptions, subcontractor requirements, and nature of operations are listed in additional remarks.
